nodes.name: Download PDF
nodes.notes: Set KB_PDF_URL in n8n environment variables or replace with the direct Google Drive download URL: https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=FILE_ID

meta.description: One-time workflow. Downloads the RelayPay KB PDF, extracts text, chunks it into 500-word segments with 50-word overlap, generates embeddings via OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, and stores them in Supabase pgvector. Run once after setting up the Supabase schema. After execution, create the HNSW index in Supabase SQL Editor.
meta.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: (1) Replace credential IDs above with your actual n8n credential IDs. (2) Set KB_PDF_URL env var or hardcode the Google Drive download URL in the HTTP Request node. (3) After running, execute the HNSW index SQL in supabase/schema.sql.
